tools.name: golangci-lint
tools.notes: Runs on main.go, cmd/, internal/, pkg/. Uses golangci-lint defaults (no custom config file).

tools.name: ruff
tools.notes: Configured in [tool.ruff] section of pyproject.toml. Includes pyflakes, pycodestyle, mccabe, bugbear, bandit, comprehensions, pydocstyle, isort, pytest, and more.

tools.name: mypy
tools.notes: Type checking for Python code. Run via nox session.

tools.name: yamlfmt
tools.notes: Part of pre-commit hooks, formats YAML files.

linting.notes: Pre-commit hooks configured in .pre-commit-config.yaml with multiple linters. Go lint uses defaults. Python uses comprehensive ruff configuration.

frameworks.name: Go testing
frameworks.notes: Tests use standard Go testing. Integration tests require Docker (testcontainers-go). Unit tests in converter and mapper packages work without infrastructure. Full test suite requires ml-metadata container.

frameworks.name: pytest
frameworks.mock_patterns: Uses pytest fixtures for test setup
frameworks.notes: Python tests managed via nox. Most tests require Docker (testcontainers). Type mapping tests (9 tests) work without infrastructure. Full test suite requires ml-metadata container.

frameworks.name: Robot Framework
frameworks.notes: Integration tests that require running model-registry service via docker-compose. Tests both REST and Python client modes.

testing.notes: Multi-language test suite. Go and Python have unit tests that work standalone, but integration tests require Docker infrastructure.

gating_checks.name: build
gating_checks.notes: Runs on pull_request for Go code. Requires Go 1.19, protoc 24.3, Python 3.9, nodejs/npm. Uploads coverage to Codecov.

gating_checks.name: python-tests (lint)
gating_checks.notes: Python linting with ruff. Matrix builds Python 3.10.

gating_checks.name: python-tests (tests)
gating_checks.notes: Python tests with pytest. Matrix builds Python 3.9 and 3.10. Uploads coverage to Codecov.

gating_checks.name: python-tests (mypy)
gating_checks.notes: Type checking with mypy. Failure creates error annotation but may not fail CI.

gating_checks.name: python-tests (docs-build)
gating_checks.notes: Builds Sphinx documentation. Uploads docs as artifact.

gating_checks.name: run-robot-tests
gating_checks.notes: Integration tests using Robot Framework. Builds and runs model-registry in Docker.

ci.notes: All workflows are gating on pull_request. Build workflow ignores docs and metadata changes. Python and Robot tests run on all PRs.

build_steps: make gen (generates protobuf, OpenAPI client/server, converters)
build.notes: Build requires protoc 24.3, nodejs/npm for openapi-generator-cli, java-11 for openapi-generator. Code generation downloads ml-metadata protos v1.14.0 and generates Go code. Python client uses Poetry for dependency management.

conventions.test_file_pattern: *_test.go for Go, test_*.py for Python, *.robot for Robot Framework
conventions.test_naming: TestFunctionName for Go, test_function_name for Python
conventions.import_style: Go: standard library, external, internal. Python: managed by ruff isort.
conventions.notes: Go tests use table-driven tests pattern. Python tests use pytest fixtures defined in conftest.py.

lint_commands.notes: Runs golangci-lint on main.go, cmd/, internal/, pkg/. No issues found.

test_commands.notes: Unit tests pass (95 tests). These don't require Docker.
Full test suite requires Docker for testcontainers. Fails with 'Cannot connect to the Docker daemon'. Unit tests work, integration tests need infrastructure.

container_recipe.notes: Go build and lint work in standard container. Tests are split: unit tests (converter, mapper) work standalone, integration tests (core) require Docker-in-Docker or external ml-metadata service. For Python: use python:3.10 base, install poetry/nox, run 'cd /app/clients/python && nox --session lint' (validated, passes) and 'nox --session tests' (9/43 tests pass without Docker).

results.output_snippet: Installing go-enum, protoc-gen-go, golangci-lint, goverter, openapi-generator-cli. Some npm warnings about Node version (has 18, wants 20) but tools installed.
results.notes: All build tools installed. npm warnings are non-fatal.

results.output_snippet:
FAIL: TestRunCoreTestSuite (0.00s)
    test_container_utils.go:102: error setting up mlmd grpc container: Cannot connect to the Docker daemon
results.notes: Integration tests require Docker daemon. Unit tests work, integration tests need infrastructure.

results.output_snippet:
nox > ruff check .
nox > Session lint-3.10 was successful.
results.notes: Python linting passed with no issues

results.output_snippet:
========================= 9 passed, 34 errors in 5.88s =========================
ERROR tests/test_client.py::test_register_new - docker.errors.DockerException
results.notes: 9 unit tests passed (type mapping tests). 34 tests failed due to missing Docker daemon. Coverage shows 48% on non-infrastructure code.

validation.summary: Go: lint OK, unit tests OK (95 passed), integration tests require Docker. Python: lint OK, unit tests OK (9 passed), integration tests require Docker. Total validated: lint 100%, unit tests 100%, integration tests require infrastructure.

gaps: Integration tests (both Go and Python) require Docker/testcontainers and cannot run in basic container without Docker-in-Docker or external services
Robot Framework tests require full docker-compose stack with model-registry service running
No golangci-lint configuration file - uses defaults (may accept code that could be more strictly linted)
Python tests have 48% coverage on code that doesn't require infrastructure, indicating many tests are integration-only
Tests require ml-metadata v1.14.0 service running which is not trivial to set up
Build process has warnings about Node.js version (has 18, wants 20) though it still works
